United States.title: Tensions rise between US and Iran over recent protests.
United States.summary: Protests in Iran have led to an escalation of tensions between the US and Iran, posing a threat to regional stability.
The US Supreme Court ruled in a case related to campaign finance laws, sparking controversy.
A ransomware attack hit a major US healthcare system, compromising patient data.

South Korea.title: North Korea Launches Missile Over Japan
South Korea.summary: North Korea has launched a missile over Japan, heightening tensions in the region. South Korea has vowed to strengthen its military presence in response.

South Korea.title: South Korean President's approval ratings hit new low
South Korea.summary: South Korean President Yoon Suk-yeol's approval ratings have hit a new low due to criticism over his handling of the economy and other issues.

South Korea.title: Thousands protest in South Korea over planned military reform
South Korea.summary: Thousands of protesters have taken to the streets in South Korea to express their opposition to a planned military reform. The reform aims to merge the country's air and ground forces, but critics argue it will make the military weaker.

Japan.title: Protests against nuclear power in Japan escalate
Japan.summary: Protests have been ongoing in Japan against the country's nuclear power plants, with demonstrators calling for the shutdown of the plants. The situation has escalated in recent days, with some protesters blocking access to the plants. This has raised concerns about the potential for violence and disruption to the country's energy supply.

Japan.title: Japan's cabinet approves bill to boost national security
Japan.summary: Japan's cabinet has approved a bill aimed at boosting the country's national security. The bill includes measures to increase military spending and enhance cybersecurity. While the bill is seen as a positive step, some critics have expressed concerns about its potential impact on civil liberties.

Japan.title: Demonstrations against Japan's LGBTQ+ laws continue
Japan.summary: Demonstrations have been taking place in Japan against the country's laws restricting LGBTQ+ rights. While the protests have been largely peaceful, they have raised concerns about the treatment of LGBTQ+ individuals in Japan.
